compounds.frequency: not daily; maximum once per week

side_effects.description: Drug does serious altering of dopamine response; frequent use will fuck with normal mood
Creates constant arousal that would be problematic if used daily (raging hard on every time attractive person walks by or pants brush against body)

protocol_notes: Strongly advises against daily use. Notes that PT-141 affects dopamine response system similar to how it affects other drugs that alter dopamine. Clinical trials excluded anyone with depression, psychosis, bipolar disorder, substance abuse, or taking antidepressants/mood stabilizers/benzodiazepines. Reports from community indicate mood alterations not seen in trials, with some reporting months of profound depression requiring clinical intervention.
